tracks.meaning: a specific day, month, or year identified by a calendar system
the sweet fruit of a date palm tree, typically brown and oval-shaped
to mark or assign a date to a document or object
the day on which a legal document, contract, or agreement becomes effective
to determine the age of a rock, fossil, or archaeological artifact using scientific methods
a person one is romantically involved with or going out with
the temporal reference line at the top of a letter or document indicating when it was written
the expiration or use-by time printed on food or product packaging
